description: Trigger accuracy cases for when good-repo should and should not load.

cases.prompt: Audit this repository and tell me whether it is launch-ready.
cases.reason: Direct repo quality / launch readiness request.

cases.prompt: What GitHub topics, homepage, and description should I set for this project?
The README has a live demo URL but GitHub does not show it in the sidebar. Can you check this?
Assess every repo under github.com/adewale and tell me what to clean up first.
Is this Agent Skill repo structured correctly for Claude, Codex, and Pi?
What makes hallmark and good-pr exemplary repos, and how should we copy those patterns here?
cases.reason: Exemplar comparison and transferable repo patterns.

cases.prompt: Improve the README and tell me what else this repo needs before launch.
cases.reason: README plus repo-level launch gaps; pair with good-readme.

cases.prompt: Does improving README, topics, license, and CI make a GitHub repo more popular?
cases.reason: Repo popularity/adoption impact question tied to repository quality signals.

cases.prompt: Rewrite this README introduction to be clearer and more concise.
cases.reason: README-only writing should use the README specialist.

cases.prompt: Help me write a PR description for this bug fix.
cases.reason: Single PR packaging belongs to good-pr.

cases.prompt: Write Vitest tests for this parser and improve assertion quality.
Review this auth middleware for correctness and security bugs.
cases.reason: Code review without repo public-surface concern.

cases.prompt: Triage these GitHub issues and suggest labels.
cases.reason: Issue triage alone is not repo effectiveness unless tied to repo configuration/process.
